channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vintage Photos Celebrate Lizabeth Scott’s Enduring Legacy as a Film Noir Star
item.description: This article highlights the life, career, and lasting appeal of American actress Lizabeth Scott (1922–2015), one of the most recognizable faces of classic film noir during the 1940s and 1950s. Known f...

item.title: Opinion Writer Criticizes White House Page Targeting Three Pro-Trump Critics
item.description: This opinion article by Tara Dublin argues that a recently published White House webpage identifying three individuals as 'Leftist Influencers' represents a troubling escalation in the Trump administr...

item.title: Rare Behind-the-Scenes Photos of Michael J. Fox During the Filming of Doc Hollywood and the Onset of Parkinson’s Symptoms
item.description: The article revisits the production of the 1991 romantic comedy “Doc Hollywood,” starring Michael J. Fox, and explains why the film occupies a significant place in the actor’s personal history. While ...

item.title: President Zardari urges focus on public welfare, provincial rights and economic stability ahead of FY2026-27 budget
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari met Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif at the President House to discuss the upcoming federal budget for FY2026-27, which is scheduled to be presented on June 10. During the meet...

item.title: Rachel Maddow Highlights Negative Crowd Reaction to Trump at NBA Finals Game in New York
item.description: MSNBC host Rachel Maddow devoted part of her program to President Donald Trump's appearance at Game 3 of the NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden in New York City. During the broadcast, Maddow showed f...

item.description: Election data analyst Harry Enten appeared on CNN to address conspiracy theories spread by President Donald Trump's supporters following the elimination of MAGA-aligned reality star Spencer Pratt from...

item.title: National Security Critics Question Trump's Appointment of Bill Pulte as Director of National Intelligence
item.description: A political commentary published by Raw Story reports on criticism surrounding President Donald Trump's decision to appoint Bill Pulte as the new Director of National Intelligence (DNI). The article c...

item.title: Color Photographs Document Daily Life, Growth, and Tourism in 1950s Florida
item.description: This article presents a collection of color photographs from Florida during the 1950s, illustrating a period of significant demographic growth, economic development, and social change across the state...

item.title: Ana Navarro Criticizes Former Trump Campaign Official During CNN Debate Over Trump's Remarks About Female Journalists

item.title: Sonia Sotomayor criticizes Mississippi Supreme Court’s jury selection standards in death penalty case
item.description: Justice Sonia Sotomayor issued a strong rebuke of the Mississippi Supreme Court in a death penalty case involving Tony Terrell Clark, a Black man sentenced by a jury composed of 11 white jurors and on...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Urges Diplomacy as Israel-Iran Tensions Escalate Despite Fragile Ceasefire
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif called on all parties involved in the Middle East conflict to exercise restraint and prioritise diplomacy following a fresh exchange of attacks between Iran and Israel. I...

item.title: The 1963 Shelby 289 Cobra and Its Lasting Impact on American Sports Car Performance

item.description: Rep. Randy Fine, a Republican member of Congress from Florida, has come under scrutiny after publicly urging Israel to take military action against Iran despite reported calls from President Donald Tr...

item.title: Max Boot Criticizes Trump's Handling of Stalemated Iran War with No Clear Exit Strategy

item.title: Pope Leo Draws Massive Crowds in Madrid During Weekend Shared With Bad Bunny Events
item.description: The article examines the unusual convergence of two globally recognized figures in Madrid: Pope Leo, the first U.S.-born pope and leader of the Catholic Church, and Puerto Rican music superstar Bad Bu...

item.title: Comedian Walter Masterson Uses Satirical Interviews at Florida MAGA Rally to Highlight Perceived Double Standards
item.description: Comedian and political commentator Walter Masterson attended a MAGA rally in Florida while posing as an enthusiastic supporter and wearing an 'ultra MAGA' shirt. During the event, he conducted a serie...

item.title: Ninth Circuit Judge Ryan Nelson Faces Misconduct Review Following Idaho Battery Charge
item.description: Judge Ryan Nelson, a member of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit who was appointed by President Donald Trump in 2018, is the subject of a judicial misconduct investigation after being ch...

item.title: Retired General Criticizes Trump's Comments on Iran War Objectives and Troop Deployment Timeline

item.title: Trump Nominates Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche for Permanent Attorney General Role Amid Political Backlash
item.description: President Donald Trump officially nominated Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to serve as Attorney General on a permanent basis, a move that had been widely anticipated by political observers. The ...

item.title: Former New Mexico Attorney General Says Federal Prosecutors Hindered State Investigation Into Epstein's Zorro Ranch
item.description: Former New Mexico Attorney General Hector Balderas has alleged that federal prosecutors interfered with his office's investigation into Jeffrey Epstein's Zorro Ranch in New Mexico. According to Balder...
